checks.description: PR merged to main with all CI checks passing
checks.message: PR #31 merged at 7145e80c4663d9bb4435d191a0d5eaf9aa6945eb. All 13 CI checks passed (Typecheck & Tests, contract-validation, golden-chain, Omni Standards Gate, CI Naming Convention, Check architecture handshake, Ecosystem Integration Validation, Legacy Compatibility Check, Repository Structure Validation, Scan for hardcoded numeric fallbacks, Stale TODO Gate, TypeScript Configuration Compliance, CodeRabbit).

checks.description: npm run test:run — 534 tests pass across 67 test files
checks.message: 534 tests pass, 67 test files pass. 7 pre-existing WebSocket env errors also present on main branch before this PR (verified independently). Exit code 1 matches main branch baseline.

All hooks passed: trim trailing whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check large files, check merge conflicts, check yaml, check json, reject .env files, block planning docs, block hardcoded URLs/IPs/paths, ESLint, TypeScript typecheck.

checks.description: All Task 3 actions from OMN-9594 plan delivered
checks.message: Delivered: README.md (updated with owns/does-not-own, status, docs map, doctrine link), SECURITY.md (new), docs/README.md (new canonical index), docs/architecture/composable-frame.md (new, promoted from 2026-04-10 design plan), docs/implementation-status.md (new), docs/development.md (new), docs/reference/dashboard-definition.md (new), docs/reference/component-manifest.md (new).

checks.description: No new broken doc links introduced
checks.message: onex-validate-links reports 8 broken links on both main and this branch — same pre-existing stale references to renamed widget files. Zero new broken links introduced by this PR.

notes: No ticket contract exists for OMN-9598 (documentation-only task). Receipt written manually from verified local and CI evidence.
